options.zh: 可觸及嵌入子句中的任何位置
options.en: It can reach any position inside an embedded clause

options.zh: 只能觸及嵌入 CP 的補語位置
options.en: Only the complement position of an embedded CP

options.zh: 只能觸及同一個 TP 內部
options.en: Only within the same TP

explanationZh: 假設 (42):c-統御下的特徵核對不超過任何嵌入 CP 的指示語。換言之,嵌入 C 的補語對特徵核對而言是不可見的;此概括後來推廣到相位(PIC)。
explanationEn: Hypothesis (42): feature checking under c-command reaches no further than the specifier of any embedded CP. The complement of an embedded C is invisible to feature matching; this is later generalized to phases (the PIC).

questionZh: 為了「強迫」wh-語移入中介 Spec-CP,本章對嵌入 C 提出了什麼假設?
questionEn: To 'force' a wh-phrase into the intermediate Spec-CP, what assumption does the chapter make about embedded C?

options.zh: 嵌入 C 可選擇性帶有 [uwh*] 特徵
options.en: Embedded C may optionally bear a [uwh*] feature

options.zh: 嵌入 C 永遠不能帶任何 wh-特徵
options.en: Embedded C can never bear any wh-feature

options.zh: 嵌入 C 必須帶 [Q] 特徵
options.en: Embedded C must bear a [Q] feature

options.zh: 嵌入 C 必須被刪除
options.en: Embedded C must be deleted

explanationZh: 原則 (43):嵌入 C 可選擇性帶有 [uwh*]。此抽象特徵在英語中無形態標記,但因為是強特徵會驅動 wh-語移入下層 Spec-CP,使其在該處可被更高 C 核對。
explanationEn: Principle (43): embedded C may optionally bear [uwh*]. This abstract feature is morphologically unmarked in English but, being strong, drives the wh-phrase into the lower Spec-CP, where it becomes accessible to the higher C.

questionZh: 本章把「特徵核對不超過嵌入相位的指示語」這個概括稱為______(英文縮寫)。
questionEn: The chapter calls the generalization 'feature matching reaches no further than the specifier of an embedded phase' the ______ (English abbreviation).
answerTextZh: 相位不可穿透性條件(PIC,Phase Impenetrability Constraint)
answerTextEn: Phase Impenetrability Constraint (PIC)
explanationZh: 概括 (46):特徵核對不超過嵌入相位的指示語,稱為相位不可穿透性條件(PIC)。給出此行為的範疇(CP、DP、某些 PP)稱為相位(phases)。
explanationEn: Generalization (46): feature matching reaches no further than the specifier of an embedded phase, called the Phase Impenetrability Constraint (PIC). Categories showing this behaviour (CP, DP, some PP) are called phases.

questionZh: 「相位(phase)」與「島嶼(island)」是同義詞,可以互換使用。
questionEn: 'Phase' and 'island' are synonyms and can be used interchangeably.

options.zh: 真
options.en: True

options.zh: 假
options.en: False

explanationZh: 假。相位是理論術語,指只有指示語對特徵核對可見的範疇;島嶼則是描述性術語,僅描述「無法 wh-移出」的成分,本身不解釋原因。
explanationEn: False. 'Phase' is a theoretical term for constituents whose only accessible position for feature matching is their specifier; 'island' is a descriptive term for a constituent impervious to wh-movement, which by itself does not tell us why.

questionZh: 為什麼 *Medea seemed that has poisoned Jason 在 PIC 之下被排除?
questionEn: Why is *Medea seemed that has poisoned Jason ruled out under the PIC?

options.zh: 因為 Medea 不是 wh-語,不會移入下層 Spec-CP,因此永遠無法被母句 T 的 EPP 特徵觸及
options.en: Because Medea is not a wh-phrase, it does not move to the lower Spec-CP and is never accessible to the matrix T's EPP feature

options.zh: 因為 seem 不能選擇 CP 補語
options.en: Because seem cannot select a CP complement

options.zh: 因為 Medea 缺少格特徵
options.en: Because Medea lacks a case feature

options.zh: 因為母句 T 沒有 EPP 特徵
options.en: Because the matrix T has no EPP feature

explanationZh: Medea 非 wh-語,不會移入下層 Spec-CP;依 PIC,它停在嵌入 CP 內部,對母句 T 的 EPP 與 [nom] 不可見,因此無法被提升至母句主語位置。
explanationEn: Medea is not a wh-phrase, so it does not move into the lower Spec-CP; by the PIC it stays inside the embedded CP, invisible to the matrix T's EPP and [nom] features, and cannot raise to the matrix subject position.

questionZh: 依「不當移位限制(Improper Movement Restriction)」,在 Spec-CP 中只有什麼特徵是可見的?
questionEn: According to the Improper Movement Restriction, what is the only feature visible in Spec-CP?

options.zh: wh-特徵
options.en: Wh-features

options.zh: 格特徵
options.en: Case features

options.zh: EPP 特徵
options.en: EPP features

options.zh: φ-特徵
options.en: φ-features

explanationZh: 限制 (52):在 Spec-CP 中只有 wh-特徵可見。這排除 *Who seemed (that) had poisoned Jason 中由 Spec-CP 移到 Spec-TP 的不當移位,因為 T 的 EPP 無法核對 Spec-CP 中 who 的 D 特徵。
explanationEn: Restriction (52): only wh-features are visible in Spec-CP. This rules out the improper Spec-CP-to-Spec-TP step in *Who seemed (that) had poisoned Jason, since T's EPP cannot match the D feature of who in Spec-CP.

questionZh: 什麼是「不當移位(improper movement)」?請以 *Who seemed had poisoned Jason 的衍生為例說明哪一步出問題。
questionEn: What is 'improper movement'? Using the derivation of *Who seemed had poisoned Jason, explain which step is problematic.
answerTextZh: 不當移位是指從 Spec-CP 移到「非 Spec-CP」的某種位置(如 A-移位回到 Spec-TP)。在該衍生中,who 先合法移入嵌入 Spec-CP;問題出在第 4 步:母句 T 試圖用 EPP/格特徵把 who 從 Spec-CP 提升到母句 Spec-TP。依不當移位限制,Spec-CP 中只有 wh-特徵可見,T 的 EPP 無法核對 who 的 D 特徵,故此步不合法。
answerTextEn: Improper movement is movement that proceeds from Spec-CP to some other (non-Spec-CP) kind of position (e.g. A-movement to Spec-TP). In the derivation, who first moves legitimately into the embedded Spec-CP; the problem is step 4: the matrix T tries to raise who from Spec-CP to the matrix Spec-TP via its EPP/case features. By the Improper Movement Restriction, only wh-features are visible in Spec-CP, so T's EPP cannot match who's D feature, making that step illegitimate.
explanationZh: Generative Grammar 傳統把「由 Spec-CP 進到他種位置」的移位稱為不當移位;Adger 以限制 (52) 處理之,排除 who 由 Spec-CP 經由 D/EPP 特徵移到 Spec-TP 的步驟。
explanationEn: The Generative tradition calls movement from Spec-CP to some other position improper movement; Adger handles it with restriction (52), ruling out the step where who moves from Spec-CP to Spec-TP via D/EPP features.

questionZh: wh-島嶼限制(Wh-Island Constraint)說的是什麼?
questionEn: What does the Wh-Island Constraint state?

options.zh: 無法把 wh-語移出一個其指示語已被另一個 wh-語佔據的 CP
options.en: A wh-phrase cannot be moved out of a CP whose specifier already contains another wh-phrase

options.zh: wh-語永遠不能移出任何子句
options.en: A wh-phrase can never move out of any clause

options.zh: 一個句子只能有一個 wh-語
options.en: A sentence may contain only one wh-phrase

options.zh: wh-語必須留在原位
options.en: Wh-phrases must remain in situ

explanationZh: 概括 (61):無法把 wh-語移出一個其指示語已含另一 wh-語的 CP(如 *What did you ask who saw?)。因為母句 C 只吸引最近的 wh-語,且更深的 wh-語不在 CP 相位指示語。
explanationEn: Generalization (61): it is impossible to move a wh-phrase out of a CP with another wh-phrase in its specifier (e.g. *What did you ask who saw?), because the matrix C attracts the closest wh-phrase and the deeper one is not in the CP phase's specifier.

questionZh: 用 D-linked wh-語對比 ?Which city did you ask which king invaded? 與 *Which king did you ask which city invaded?,本章如何解釋後者完全不合法?
questionEn: Contrasting D-linked ?Which city did you ask which king invaded? with *Which king did you ask which city invaded?, how does the chapter explain the total ungrammaticality of the latter?

options.zh: 被移的嵌入主語不在 CP 相位的指示語,故對母句 C 不可見
options.en: The extracted embedded subject is not in the specifier of the CP phase, so it is invisible to the matrix C

options.zh: 因為 which king 不是 D-linked
options.en: Because which king is not D-linked

options.zh: 因為違反了優位效應(superiority)
options.en: Because it violates superiority

options.zh: 因為 invade 不能帶賓語
options.en: Because invade cannot take an object

explanationZh: D-linked 賓語可先解除優位移入嵌入 Spec-CP,故能再往上移(slightly degraded);但 D-linked 主語留在 Spec-TP,不在 CP 相位指示語,依 PIC 不可見,故 *Which king... 完全不合法。因為 wh-主語是 D-linked,故不能歸因於優位。
explanationEn: A D-linked object can void superiority and sit in the embedded Spec-CP, so it can move further (slightly degraded); but the D-linked subject stays in Spec-TP, not in the CP phase's specifier, hence invisible under the PIC, making *Which king... fully ungrammatical. Since the wh-subject is D-linked, superiority cannot be the cause.

questionZh: 為了解釋複合名詞組島嶼(如 *Which city do you believe the claim that Philip would invade?),本章作了什麼假設?該假設如何結合 PIC 排除這類抽取?
questionEn: To explain Complex Noun Phrase Islands (e.g. *Which city do you believe the claim that Philip would invade?), what does the chapter assume, and how does it combine with the PIC to rule out such extraction?
answerTextZh: 本章假設 DP(如 CP 一樣)也是相位。依 PIC,除了相位的指示語之外,DP 內部任何成分對稍後合併的 [uwh*] C 都不可見。由於這些例子中 wh-語從不是 DP 的指示語(the 等定指限定詞無法帶 [uwh*]),wh-移位被正確預測為不可能。
answerTextEn: The chapter assumes DPs, like CPs, are phases. By the PIC, except for its specifier, anything inside a DP is inaccessible to a later-Merged [uwh*] C. Since the wh-phrase is never the specifier of DP in these cases (definite determiners like 'the' cannot host [uwh*]), wh-movement is correctly predicted to be impossible.
explanationZh: 本章假設 DP 也是相位:依 PIC,除指示語外,DP 內部任何成分對稍後合併的 [uwh*] C 都不可見。由於這些例子中 wh-語都不在 DP 的指示語,故 wh-移位被正確預測為不可能。
explanationEn: The chapter assumes DPs are phases too: by the PIC, except for its specifier, anything inside a DP is inaccessible to a later-Merged [uwh*] C. Since the wh-phrase is never the specifier of DP in these cases, wh-movement is correctly predicted impossible.

questionZh: 本章觀察到:定指 DP 是島嶼,而不定指 DP 則允許抽取(不是島嶼)。
questionEn: The chapter observes that definite DPs are islands, whereas indefinite DPs allow extraction (are not islands).

options.zh: 真
options.en: True

options.zh: 假
options.en: False

explanationZh: 真。如 *Which poem did you hear those recitals of? (定指,不合法) 對比 Which poem did you go to hear a recital of? (不定指,合法)。本章保留兩種可能解釋,並暫定只有定指 DP 是相位。
explanationEn: True. Compare *Which poem did you hear those recitals of? (definite, ungrammatical) with Which poem did you go to hear a recital of? (indefinite, grammatical). The chapter leaves two explanations open and provisionally assumes only definite DPs are phases.

questionZh: 本章用什麼額外條件來解釋主語島嶼(無法從 Spec-TP 中的主語抽取)?
questionEn: What additional condition does the chapter use to explain subject islands (the impossibility of extraction from a subject in Spec-TP)?

options.zh: 相位的指示語只有在該相位處於被 θ-指派中心語選擇的位置時才對特徵核對可見
options.en: The specifier of a phase is only visible to feature matching if the phase is in a position selected by a θ-assigning head

options.zh: 主語永遠不能含 wh-語
options.en: Subjects can never contain a wh-phrase

options.zh: Spec-TP 不是相位指示語
options.en: Spec-TP is not a phase specifier

options.zh: T 永遠帶 [uwh*]
options.en: T always bears [uwh*]

explanationZh: 條件 (109/126):相位的指示語只有在該相位位於被 θ-指派中心語選擇的位置時才可見。Spec-TP 是非 θ 位置(T 不指派 θ-角色),故主語內成分不可見,正確排除主語島嶼抽取。
explanationEn: Condition (109/126): a phase's specifier is visible only if the phase is in a position selected by a θ-assigning head. Spec-TP is a non-θ position (T assigns no θ-role), so elements inside subjects are invisible, correctly ruling out extraction from subject islands.

questionZh: 本章如何解釋附加語島嶼(無法從時間/原因/條件附加語子句抽取,如 *Who had Hephaestus run away before the executioner murdered?)?
questionEn: How does the chapter explain adjunct islands (the impossibility of extraction from temporal/causal/conditional adjunct clauses, e.g. *Who had Hephaestus run away before the executioner murdered?)?
answerTextZh: 與主語島嶼同理:附加語從不處於被選擇中心語以 θ-標記的位置。因此,即使引介附加語的 C 可選擇性帶 [uwh*]、wh-語得以移入其 Spec-CP,依「相位須在 θ-位置其指示語才可見」的條件,該指示語對母句 C 仍不可見,故 wh-移位被排除。
answerTextEn: By the same logic as subject islands: adjuncts are never in a position where they are θ-marked by a selecting head. So even if the C introducing the adjunct optionally bears [uwh*] and a wh-phrase moves into its Spec-CP, the condition 'a phase's specifier is visible only if the phase is in a θ-position' makes that specifier invisible to the matrix C, ruling out wh-movement.
explanationZh: 與主語島嶼同理:附加語從不處於被選擇中心語 θ-標記的位置,故即使其 C 可選擇性帶 [uwh*]、wh-語移入其 Spec-CP,該指示語對母句 C 仍不可見。
explanationEn: By the same logic as subject islands: adjuncts are never θ-marked by a selecting head, so even if their C optionally bears [uwh*] and a wh-phrase moves into their Spec-CP, that specifier remains invisible to the matrix C.

questionZh: 本章承認:句子主語島嶼可同時被「相位須在 θ-位置」的條件與「子句主語特殊句法」所排除,構成理論上的冗餘。
questionEn: The chapter acknowledges that sentential subject islands can be ruled out both by the 'phase-in-θ-position' condition and by the special syntax of clausal subjects, creating a theoretical redundancy.

options.zh: 真
options.en: True

options.zh: 假
options.en: False

explanationZh: 真。若子句主語位於特殊 CP 的指示語,則該結構同時被「相位須在 θ-位置」與該構式特殊句法排除。本章坦承這是理論冗餘,雖非理想但暫予接受。
explanationEn: True. If clausal subjects sit in the specifier of a special CP, the structure is ruled out both by the phase-in-θ-position condition and by the special syntax of the construction. The chapter admits this redundancy is not ideal but lives with it.

questionZh: 依本章摘要,wh-島嶼與 DP 島嶼由______解釋,而主語島嶼與附加語島嶼則由「相位須位於 θ-位置以供 Agree」解釋。
questionEn: Per the chapter summary, wh-islands and DP islands are explained by the ______, whereas subject islands and adjunct islands are explained by 'phases must be in a θ-position for Agree'.
answerTextZh: PIC(相位不可穿透性條件)
answerTextEn: the PIC (Phase Impenetrability Constraint)
explanationZh: 摘要表:連續循環性由 PIC 與 C 上可選 [uwh*] 解釋;DP 島嶼與 wh-島嶼由 PIC 解釋;主語島嶼與附加語島嶼由「相位須在 θ-位置以供 Agree」解釋。
explanationEn: Summary table: successive cyclicity is explained by the PIC plus optional [uwh*] on C; DP islands and wh-islands by the PIC; subject and adjunct islands by 'phases must be in a θ-position for Agree'.
